description: Schema-validated raw-to-frozen lineage contract for governed rescue datasets.

required_fields.name: contract_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the rescue task contract artifact.

required_fields.name: governance_status
required_fields.description: Whether the lineage artifact is an example, planned, or active artifact.

required_fields.name: freeze_manifest_path
required_fields.description: Repo-relative path to the governing rescue freeze manifest.

required_fields.name: raw_sources
required_fields.description: Upstream raw snapshots that feed the governed rescue freeze.

required_fields.name: transformation_steps
required_fields.description: Ordered steps that convert raw inputs into frozen rescue datasets.

required_fields.name: frozen_datasets
required_fields.description: Frozen dataset outputs produced by the documented lineage.

required_fields.name: description
required_fields.description: Short governance summary for the raw-to-frozen lineage.
